items.title: Internal Platform Reliability Runbook
items.description: Internal Platform Reliability Runbook exists to improve linked customer and business outcomes through a narrower, measurable internal workflow investment set.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve automation success rate through a more reliable and better-scoped internal workflow.
Improve audit evidence completeness through a more reliable and better-scoped internal workflow.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase internal platform trust and stability through reuse, automation, and stronger operating flow.

productBricks.change: Extended the brick with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended the brick with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended the brick with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Automation and Insight Studio API.
